title: PC Killer
description: Added very realistic flames (also accompanied by stuttering)
body:
## be careful:
**This mod does not recommend placing multiple flames at once, as it can cause significant lag (just like the name of the mod).**
## describe:


This mod adds very realistic flames that can be synthesized using very expensive materials. You can use JEI or similar mods to view them.

Just like this：
![fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16bca2c50cf26078647cd3f4cb29369fac6c65db.png)

The tree caught fire！

![tree is fire !](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a7a1df97d93691aeefe6f8f8d225caa428964f_0.webp)
